stories.title: Sign in
stories.intro: Org runs your CEO-led agent organizations. Like every OpenApe app it signs you in via DDISA SSO — same passkey, same IdP.

steps.title: Open Org
steps.caption: The start page is the sign-in: enter your email and continue.

steps.title: Signed in — your organizations
steps.caption: On first visit the list is empty — each org you create is a virtual company with its own CEO, team, budget and reports.

stories.title: Create your first org
stories.intro: An org starts with three things: a name, a vision the CEO will read, and a monthly budget cap the Sanierer enforces.

steps.title: Start a new organization
steps.caption: Click **Create your first org**. The dialog asks for the basics — you can refine the vision and grow the team later.

steps.title: Name, vision, budget
steps.caption: The vision is plain prose — the CEO reads it. The monthly budget is the hard cap: above it, the Sanierer stops the CEO from hiring more.

steps.title: Create
steps.caption: The org page opens: org chart, members, cost dashboard and reports — empty for now, ready for a CEO.
